summary: Full backend + frontend regression for the simplified-signup / force-profile-redirect / team self-select / decider Seasons hide / PWA refactor. All 5 backend pytest cases PASSED. All 20+ Playwright UI checks PASSED including: 4-field-only register form, first-time-banner post signup, ProtectedRoute redirect for incomplete users, admin bypass, profile-team-input dropdown, Attendance/League sidebar labels, Seasons visible for builder, Seasons HIDDEN for decider (verified via API patch + reload), manifest.json (200, theme_color=#EAB308, start_url=.), service-worker.js (200, contains CACHE_NAME), SW registration + controller present on reload. Admin club_type restored to 'builder' after decider test.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~2318 lines — still growing; recommend splitting into routers/modules.
REQUIRED_PROFILE_FIELDS in ProtectedRoute does NOT include team_id, so join-team is not strictly required for dashboard access — intentional? if yes, ok. If team is expected before entering, add it.
/api/profile/join-team uses query-param (team_id) instead of JSON body — non-idiomatic for REST but works.
seed_data_creation: Registered a transient TEST_reg_* user and a test_pw_* user for signup+redirect flow. Temporarily flipped admin.club_type to 'decider' and restored to 'builder'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refactor items verified end-to-end on preview URL. PWA fully functional (manifest+SW+registration+controller). Admin.club_type restored to builder. New test file at /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_signup.py covers register minimal, /teams/public auth+listing, /profile/join-team happy+404.
